layman_headline: Crypto market is gripped by fear — patience is the smartest move right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' territory at 25/100, and that fear is getting worse, not better. Most coins on our watchlist are either crashing hard (BONK down 24% in a week) or have already run up too far to chase (LDO up 23%, DEXE overbought). There's no clean setup where the technicals, momentum, and risk/reward all line up favorably. Jumping in now would be catching a falling knife in a fearful market without a clear catalyst to reverse the trend.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. When the market is this fearful and charts are this ugly, the best trade is no trade. Watch for stabilization signals over the next few days before committing capital.
expert_reasoning: I evaluated all 10 candidates systematically. BONK has an appealing oversold RSI (31) which is a reliable signal per our track record (80% win rate), but the chart is strongly bearish (-2.0 bias) with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — pure capitulation selling that hasn't found a floor. DEXE and INJ are overbought (RSI 71 and 64) with poor risk/reward ratios. LDO has the best chart bias (+0.85) with Three White Soldiers, but it's already up 23% in a week and the risk/reward to resistance is only 0.38x — terrible entry timing. AERO has decent structure but 0.45x R/R. VVV is the cleanest candidate with 5.27x R/R, neutral RSI, and today's bounce, but it's still below all MAs in a fearful market. I'm choosing to HOLD because no setup offers both strong technicals AND favorable timing in this extreme fear environment.
risk_factors: Extreme Fear at 25 and worsening — market could cascade lower before any recovery materializes
No funding rate data available for any candidate, limiting our ability to gauge leveraged positioning
FTX's $900M creditor distribution could flood the market with sell pressure on altcoins
watch_list: BONK RSI dropping below 25 — would signal true oversold exhaustion and a higher-probability bounce entry
Fear & Greed index stabilizing or ticking upward from 25 — first sign the sell-off is exhausting itself
VVV reclaiming its 20-day SMA — would confirm the bounce is real and provide a valid entry trigger
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with a worsening trend. BTC is flat near $63,900 but altcoins are bleeding, with most candidates well below their major moving averages and far from all-time highs.
context_banner: Extreme Fear dominates with no clear reversal catalyst — disciplined patience outperforms forced entries in this environment.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 25 (Extreme Fear) and worsening week-over-week — historically risky for new entries but eventually creates opportunity once it stabilizes.
BONK RSI at 31 is our most oversold candidate and RSI is our most reliable signal (80% win rate), but the chart's -2.0 bias with Three Black Crows makes it too dangerous to catch this falling knife.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors in fifth payment round — historically these distributions create altcoin sell pressure as creditors liquidate recovered assets.
LDO shows Three White Soldiers (+0.85 bias) but already extended +23% in 7 days with 0.38x R/R — best chart but worst entry timing.
Clarity Act passage odds at record low as Senate delays — regulatory uncertainty continues to weigh on market confidence.
